hintDisplay: Sujeto: la tienda / Verbo: vender (negación) / Complemento: artículos con descuento / Tiempo: durante la venta

correctSentence: Never during the sale did the store not sell discounted items of that size

hints: Complemento: los precios de las marcas diferentes en la tienda

correctSentence: Never has my friend compared the prices of different brands in the store

hintDisplay: Sujeto: nosotros / Verbo: devolver (negación) / Complemento: los artículos sin recibo / Tiempo: nunca
spanishSentence: Nunca podremos devolver los artículos sin recibo en la tienda.
correctSentence: Never will we be able to return the items without a receipt at the store.

correctSentence: Never did she find the discount she was looking for in the store.

correctSentence: Only after closing do we sell discounted items in the store.

correctSentence: Not did the customer find the discount she wanted at the store yesterday, nor online either.

correctSentence: Never has my friend tried on the dress in the fitting room before buying it.

correctSentence: Never did my friend choose the expensive brand in the store yesterday.
